calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Called with the consolidated case number 289907. Phyllis Berenson appearing for special administrator Barbara DeVries. Counsel is requesting for continuance by stipulation. Mr. Stein has agreed to the continuance. Matter is continued to 5/29. Request to extend Special Letters to 5/29 is granted. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Loos.
